mapper.sql: id, project_id, template_id, file_id, task_id, parse_record_id, status, current_stage, progress, overall_status, summary, rule_total, rule_completed, chunk_total, issues_json, result_json, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: select from review_record where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
select from review_record where status = 'PENDING' and current_stage = 'PARSING' and parse_record_id is not null and task_id is not null and deleted = 0 order by created_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update review_record set task_id = #{taskId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and task_id is null and status = 'PENDING' and deleted = 0

update review_record set current_stage = 'QUEUED', progress = 20, error_message = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status = 'PENDING' and current_stage = 'PARSING' and deleted = 0

update review_record set status = 'PROCESSING', current_stage = 'CHUNKING', progress = greatest(progress, 25), error_message = null, started_at = coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and current_stage in ('QUEUED', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0

update review_record set status = 'COMPLETED', current_stage = 'FINISHED', progress = 100, overall_status = #{overallStatus}, summary = #{summary}, issues_json = #{issuesJson}, result_json = #{resultJson}, error_message = null, completed_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status = 'PROCESSING' and deleted = 0

update review_record set current_stage = #{currentStage}, progress = #{progress},
rule_completed = #{ruleCompleted},
chunk_total = #{chunkTotal},
updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status = 'PROCESSING' and deleted = 0

update review_record set parse_record_id = #{parseRecordId}, status = 'PENDING', current_stage = 'PARSING', progress = 5, error_message = null, completed_at = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status = 'FAILED' and deleted = 0
update review_record set issues_json = #{issuesJson}, result_json = #{resultJson}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status = 'COMPLETED' and deleted = 0

update review_record set status = 'FAILED', current_stage = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0

update review_record set status = 'CANCELED', current_stage = 'CANCELED', completed_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{recordId} and status in ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING') and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, project_id, review_record_id, template_id, template_file_id, rule_code, rule_description, rule_order, execution_status, compliance_status, reason, suggestion, evidence_json, confidence, model_trace_id, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by from review_rule_result where review_record_id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0 order by rule_order asc, id asc

select id, project_id, review_record_id, template_id, template_file_id, rule_code, rule_description, rule_order, execution_status, compliance_status, reason, suggestion, evidence_json, confidence, model_trace_id, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by from review_rule_result where review_record_id = #{recordId} and rule_code = #{ruleCode} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update review_rule_result set execution_status = 'RUNNING', compliance_status = null, reason = null, suggestion = null, evidence_json = json_array(), confidence = null, model_trace_id = null, error_message = null, started_at = current_timestamp, completed_at = null, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{ruleResultId} and execution_status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED', 'RUNNING') and deleted = 0

update review_rule_result set execution_status = 'SUCCESS', compliance_status = #{complianceStatus}, reason = #{reason}, suggestion = #{suggestion}, evidence_json = #{evidenceJson}, confidence = #{confidence}, model_trace_id = #{modelTraceId}, error_message = null, completed_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{ruleResultId} and execution_status = 'RUNNING' and deleted = 0

update review_rule_result set execution_status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{ruleResultId} and execution_status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into review_document_chunk ( project_id, review_record_id, parse_record_id, chunk_no, chunk_code, heading_path, page_start, page_end, sheet_name, row_start, row_end, content_object_name, content_hash, char_count, token_count, status, error_message, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{reviewRecordId}, #{parseRecordId}, #{chunkNo}, #{chunkCode}, #{headingPath}, #{pageStart}, #{pageEnd}, #{sheetName}, #{rowStart}, #{rowEnd}, #{contentObjectName}, #{contentHash}, #{charCount}, #{tokenCount}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: select id, project_id, review_record_id, parse_record_id, chunk_no, chunk_code, heading_path, page_start, page_end, sheet_name, row_start, row_end, content_object_name, content_hash, char_count, token_count, status, error_message, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by from review_document_chunk where review_record_id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0 order by chunk_no asc, id asc
